name: Family-Hub — the safe household concierge
description: An AI agent that runs the household — calendar, chores, shopping, outings, bills — behind hard safety gates: a no-payment invariant, server-authoritative risk tiers, provenance-verified booking handoffs, per-visitor RLS isolation, and an age-4-safe kid mode. ADK multi-agent + MCP toolbelt + a proactive morning planner.
